summary: Tested WiseDrive CRM iteration 26 features: Roles API leave entitlements, payroll preview new column structure, info modals, color styling, and weekly_off_day bug fix. All backend tests passed (6/6). Frontend features verified via Playwright.

minor.issue: Fixed KeyError: 'attendance_deduction' - the _calculate_employee_payroll_v2 method doesn't return this field but preview_payroll tried to access it

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in payroll_service.py line 910: Changed record['attendance_deduction'] to record.get('attendance_deduction', 0) to handle v2 payroll records that don't include this field
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 26 features are working: 1) Roles API returns leave entitlements (eligible_sick_leaves_per_month, eligible_casual_leaves_per_month), 2) PUT /api/roles/{id} updates leave entitlements, 3) Payroll preview shows new column structure with Working Days, Actual Working Days (with info modal), Gross Salary (with info modal), Incentive (+green), OT Pay (+green), Other Ded. (-red), Net Salary, 4) Role modal shows leave entitlement fields, 5) Weekly off day updates correctly when editing employees. Note: Employees don't have salary structures set up so payroll values show ₹0.

backend: weekly_off_day accepts all valid values (0-6) - PASS
frontend: Payroll preview new column structure - VERIFIED
Actual Working Days info modal with LOP/leave breakdown - VERIFIED
Gross Salary info modal with pro-rating calculation - VERIFIED
OT Pay column green background (rgb(209, 250, 229)) - VERIFIED
Other Deductions column red background (rgb(254, 226, 226)) - VERIFIED
Role modal shows leave entitlement fields - VERIFIED
Weekly Off Day field visible in employee modal - VERIFIED
